---
title: "Sun and Sea"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/Rogers_M_P
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/matthew-pierre-rogers-786362224
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:matthewpierrerogers@gmail.com"
---

Hi there. This is my blog, Sun and Sea. My name is Matthew-P Rogers, But you'll see MP around the site. I'm a young (at the time of writing), aspiring Jamaican marine biologist and lover of the sea.

I've created this site for a couple of reasons:

Firstly, to share the stuff I find cool, especially marine biology and data, with the world.

Secondly, to leave a record of some of my own projects and progress, for my future self (and anyone else) to look back at along the way.

Finally, to leave some messages and lessons for the (even) younger ones with similar paths to mine, so you can grow and learn from my experience.

Feel free to reach out below. It's nice to meet you and I hope you enjoy your time getting to know me while exploring the Sun and Sea.
